```json
    "Open ground condition detected on receptacle/switch rough-in.",
    "Equipment grounding conductor is not bonded/connected to the receptacle grounding terminal.",
    "Missing or loose ground connection creates shock and equipment-fault hazard.",
    "Condition violates NEC grounding and bonding requirements for receptacles."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Verify continuity of equipment grounding conductor back to panel/source.",
    "Terminate and tighten grounding conductor to receptacle grounding terminal.",
    "Test ground continuity and resistance; verify proper polarity.",
    "Re-inspect all devices on the circuit for similar defects."
  ],
  "rationale": "An open ground at a receptacle or switch during rough-complete stage is a non-compliant, hazardous defect. NEC 406.4 requires receptacles to be grounded and connected per 250.134/250.148, and 406.9 addresses device grounding/ bonding. NEC 210.8 supports GFCI protection requirements, but the immediate defect is the missing ground connection, which must be corrected before close-out.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 210.8",
    "NEC 406.4",
    "NEC 406.9"
  ]
}
```
